zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Rigby III於1475年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾克斯頓時，他的父親Nicholas Rigby II26歲，母親Lady Alice Ashton35歲。他於1500年與Agnes Urmston Ormeston在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1557年5月在英國英格蘭藍卡爾艾克斯頓享年82歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Rigby III于1475年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾艾克斯頓时，他的父亲Nicholas Rigby II26岁，母亲Lady Alice Ashton35岁。他于1500年与Agnes Urmston Ormeston在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1557年5月在英国英格兰藍卡爾艾克斯頓享年82岁。

nameMeanings.name: Rigby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire): habitational name from Ribby in Lancashire, named with Old Scandanavian hryggr ‘ridge’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’. Compare Rigsby .

variants.name: Rigsby
meanings: English: habitational name from Rigsby (Lincolnshire), probably from the genitive form of Old Norse hryggr ‘ridge’ + bȳ ‘farmstead, village’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Rigby III was born in 1475, in Eccleston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Rigby II, was 26 and his mother, Lady Alice Ashton, was 35. He married Agnes Urmston Ormeston in 1500, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 3 daughters. He died in May 1557, in Eccleston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 82.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Rigby III est né en 1475, à Eccleston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Rigby II, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Ashton, avait 35 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Urmston Ormeston en 1500, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en mai 1557, à Eccleston, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 82 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Rigby III 1475 in Eccleston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Rigby II 26 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Ashton 35. Er hat 1500 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Agnes Urmston Ormeston geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb im Mai 1557 im Alter von 82 Jahren in Eccleston, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Rigby III è nato il nel 1475 nel Eccleston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Rigby II, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Ashton, aveva 35 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Urmston Ormeston nel 1500, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel maggio 1557, nel Eccleston, Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 82 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Rigby IIIが1475年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアエククレストンで生まれた時，父Nicholas Rigby IIは26歳，母Lady Alice Ashtonは35歳であった。1500年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでAgnes Urmston Ormestonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1557年5月にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアエククレストンで82歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Rigby III(이)가 1475년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 c클스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Rigby II(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Ashton(은)는 35세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Agnes Urmston Ormeston(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1557년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 c클스턴에서 82세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Rigby III nasceu em 1475, em Eccleston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Rigby II, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Ashton, tinha 35 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Urmston Ormeston em 1500, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em maio de 1557, em Eccleston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 82 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Rigby III родился в 1475 г. в местности экклестон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Rigby II было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Ashton, 35. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Urmston Ormeston в 1500 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер май 1557 г. в местности экклестон, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 82 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicholas Rigby III nació en 1475, en Eccleston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Nicholas Rigby II, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Ashton, tenía 35 años. Se casó con Agnes Urmston Ormeston en 1500, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en mayo de 1557, en Eccleston, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 82 años.
